testcase.name: setUp

error.message: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure. Host info: host: 'DESKTOP-U6593G5', ip: '192.168.1.6' Build info: version: '4.21.0', revision: '79ed462ef4' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '25.0.1' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.remote.RemoteWebDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {browserName: chrome, goog:chromeOptions: {args: [--remote-allow-origins=*, --headless=new], extensions: []}}]}] Capabilities {browserName: chrome, goog:chromeOptions: {args: [--remote-allow-origins=*, --headless=new], extensions: []}}

testcase.name: tearDown

error.message: WebDriver is not initialized for the current thread
